_meta.purpose: Coagulation / haemostasis reference intervals + pattern interpretation (mixing study, DIC, DVT/PE, monitoring) for the rules engine + LLM. Decision support only; correlate with clinical bleeding/thrombosis + drugs.
_meta.source: Standard coagulation reference intervals + haemostasis guidance. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS; assay/reagent-specific (esp. APTT/anti-Xa).

pt.name: Prothrombin time (PT)
pt.note: Extrinsic + common pathway (VII, X, V, II, fibrinogen). Prolonged -> warfarin, liver disease, vit K deficiency, DIC.

inr.name: INR
inr.note: On warfarin: target usually 2-3 (3-4 mechanical valves). >5 or bleeding -> vit K +/- PCC.

aptt.name: Activated partial thromboplastin time (APTT)
aptt.note: Intrinsic + common pathway. Prolonged -> heparin, haemophilia A/B, factor deficiency, lupus anticoagulant, DIC.

aptt_ratio.name: APTT ratio
aptt_ratio.note: Used to titrate unfractionated heparin (target ~1.5-2.5, protocol-specific).

fibrinogen.name: Fibrinogen (Clauss)
fibrinogen.note: Acute-phase (rises in inflammation); LOW in DIC / dilution / dysfibrinogenaemia -> bleeding. <1.0 critical in obstetric haemorrhage.

d_dimer.name: D-dimer
d_dimer.note: High sensitivity/low specificity. NEGATIVE + low pretest probability rules OUT VTE. Raised in DIC, sepsis, malignancy, pregnancy, age.

thrombin_time.name: Thrombin time (TT)
thrombin_time.note: Prolonged -> heparin, dysfibrinogenaemia, low fibrinogen, dabigatran.

anti_xa.name: Anti-Xa (LMWH/DOAC)
anti_xa.note: LMWH therapeutic peak ~0.5-1.0 (4h post-dose, OD dosing differs). Assay must be drug-calibrated.

platelets.name: Platelet count
platelets.note: <20 spontaneous-bleed risk; exclude EDTA clumping (pseudothrombocytopenia) on film.

normal_pt_prolonged_aptt.note: Do a mixing study to separate factor deficiency (corrects) from inhibitor (no correction).

interpretation: common-pathway factor deficiency (X, V, II, fibrinogen)
Prolonged PT/APTT + LOW fibrinogen + LOW platelets + HIGH D-dimer + schistocytes on film
dic.note: Treat cause; support with FFP/cryo/platelets guided by results.

mixing_study_corrects.note: 1:1 mix with normal plasma corrects the prolonged time.

interpretation: Inhibitor present (lupus anticoagulant, factor inhibitor, heparin)
